analysis.summary: Simple open-source crossover indicator comparing an SMA of close against an EMA of that SMA. Directional state flips when the EMA crosses the MA.
analysis.translationNotes: Original Pine sets pos=1 when xEMA < xMA and pos=-1 when xEMA > xMA. Strategy wrapper preserves that literal directional-state logic instead of imposing a different convention.

items.author: HPotter
items.notes: Clean baseline validation script. Full source captured from TradingView Monaco view-lines. Translation is close to the original logic: compare SMA(close, n) against EMA(SMA(close, n), n).
items.title: EMA & MA Crossover

analysis.summary: Visible Pine logic suggests a pivot-high/pivot-low structure model with historical slope calculations and a machine-learning flavored clustering layer that is not fully captured in the current extraction.
analysis.translationNotes: This is not a faithful full Pine port. It is a workflow validation using the visible extracted core ideas: pivot structure plus slope direction.

items.author: Steversteves
items.notes: First live pipeline validation. Extracted from TradingView source editor using Monaco visible text. Source capture may be partial/truncated for this script; translation below is an approximation of the visible pivot/slope logic, not a full Pine-equivalent port.
items.title: Machine Learning Pivot Points (KNN) [SS]
